name: Daily Notes Automater

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Version 1.0.0 - Initial Release
Release Date: 03/30/2025

This is the first public release of the Daily Notes Automater plugin for Obsidian. It automates the creation of daily notes in your Obsidian vault based on customizable settings.

Key features and notes have been included in the Readme.

If you encounter any issues or have feedback, feel free to open an issue in the public repository for this plugin project.
